entity.description: The entity holding the permission, in one of the following forms: * user-{{userId}} * user-{{email}} (such as "user-liz@example.com") * group-{{groupId}} * group-{{email}} (such as "group-example@googlegroups.com") * domain-{{domain}} (such as "domain-example.com") * project-team-{{projectId}} * allUsers * allAuthenticatedUsers

role.description: The access permission for the entity. Possible values are: `OWNER`, `READER`.

object.description: The name of the object, if applied to an object.
